titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale Summer and Special Programs Records Concerning the Summer Language Institute
Yale Summer and Special Programs Records Concerning the Summer Language Institute
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 10:57

did.unittitle: Yale Summer and Special Programs records concerning the Summer Language Institute
did.abstract: The records consist of subject files, correspondence, financial papers, applications, and fellowship materials of the Yale Summer and Special Programs documenting the operations and activities of the Summer Language Institute.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 15-B (YRG 15-B) Records of specific summer and special programs

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See inventory for details

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright for materials authored or otherwise produced as official business of Yale University is retained by Yale University. Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale Summer and Special Programs Record Concerning the Summer Language Institute (RU 720). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of subject files, correspondence, financial papers, applications, and fellowship materials of the Yale Summer and Special Programs documenting the operations and activities of the Summer Language Institute

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession

did.unittitle: Records concerning the Summer Language Institute
Institute for Far Eastern Languages Chinese, Japanese, French
Institute of Eastern Languages: student list
National Defense Foreign Language Graduate Fellowships
